title: Utilityful Ores
description: Adds ores for resources that don't have one, with some extra fun ores on top
body: *** Utilityful Ores is a simple Forge mod that aims to add ores for resources that usually don't have one, along with some **_extra_ fun ones**, none of them will explode, don't worry about it. *** **_Some of these include_**: - Graceful Miner's Ore : Gives you some mining equipment, and haste! - Ender Ore : Gives you ender shards, which can be turned into ender pearls, this isn't an original idea, but there is currently no Forge mod that I know of that adds ender ore, for whatever reason. - Sharded Shulker Ore : Gives you shulker shards, which you can use to get shulker shells. There are _many_ more, but these are just some highlights! Above are all the ores that are currently available! *** ## Configuration Utilityful Ores is a mod that is supposed to be played with _modpacks_ and configured. You may choose to use it without any configuration, but that would be simply chaotic. If you're a modpack author or just want some guidance on the configs, check out the wiki.
